description: BroadbandNow is a consumer website for comparing internet service providers, plans, pricing, coverage, and related broadband research in the United States. It also publishes structured LLM-oriented site metadata via `llms.txt`.
summary: BroadbandNow exposes a public `llms.txt` text index; no public developer APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, or CLIs were found on broadbandnow.com.
